name: Chicken and Black Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 30 oz Black beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Use canned black beans (15 oz per can).
2. In a large bowl, gently stir together the black beans, chicken, onions, red and yellow peppers, and tomatoes.
3. For the dressing, in a small bowl, whisk together the jalapeno pepper, lime rind, and juice, garlic, salt, and pepper. Gradually whisk in the oil. Pour over the salad and add the coriander. Gently toss.
